title: Unpredictable build-as-dockerfile caching with --layers and --build-arg
body:
**Description**

Unpredictable caching in `buildah bud`.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

**1. create dockerfile**
```
$ cat Dockerfile
FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:30
MAINTAINER jdoe <jdoe@example.com>
ENV container="docker"

RUN echo this-should-be-cached-but-it-s-not && sleep 3

ARG USERNAME
ARG UID
ARG CODE
ARG PGDATA
ARG PORT=55555

CMD ["/container-run"]
```
**2. Build for the first time:**
```
$ buildah bud --layers --build-arg=UID=17122 --build-arg=CODE=/copr/coprs_frontend --build-arg=USERNAME=praiskup --build-arg=PGDATA=/pgdata .
STEP 1: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:30
STEP 2: MAINTAINER jdoe <jdoe@example.com>
--> Using cache e2d50ffd8947a4880814edfdd0a62955c927fafe6201ba2bdbffcf7f9f93868e
STEP 3: ENV container="docker"
--> Using cache 1336ba0d55cc96001a6a87ca7b1a3090b4c4bc7caf79df7259dc194435546237
STEP 4: RUN echo this-should-be-cached-but-it-s-not && sleep 3
--> Using cache da075d5c0c020a836d5bbfd946fdc9f413cf288a6570264c998578d4f2095f3a
STEP 5: ARG USERNAME
--> Using cache 44eb7b2838dac2123ba077da8a5176df6a65ae5daff8ef3f278b944a85b5ea78
STEP 6: ARG UID
--> Using cache 3fc9fb1edaf9baac057e6b5e52fc6e623f487fabafe70c0a8550e006fa8aa675
STEP 7: ARG CODE
--> e55775ddb455bbac98806c94b13caa27d1e685dbab4b4597b131d621af2b1b78
STEP 8: ARG PGDATA
--> b041ea6991b06c87b301131d74f84f911d759092f51161002fb4fdd15a61c3fd
STEP 9: ARG PORT=55555
--> 9f4b2e7c224eb642ca4dd73032757ed906121e4d9124424503b406482f026ca8
STEP 10: CMD ["/container-run"]
STEP 11: COMMIT
--> c921fdec80e4eb1cd5bc856010947437ebb65cafa783fa5f8975a4566b91da77
```
**3. build for the 2nd time, and see that caches are not used:**
```
$ buildah bud --layers --build-arg=UID=17122 --build-arg=CODE=/copr/coprs_frontend --build-arg=USERNAME=praiskup --build-arg=PGDATA=/pgdata .
STEP 1: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:30
STEP 2: MAINTAINER jdoe <jdoe@example.com>
--> Using cache e2d50ffd8947a4880814edfdd0a62955c927fafe6201ba2bdbffcf7f9f93868e
STEP 3: ENV container="docker"
--> Using cache 1336ba0d55cc96001a6a87ca7b1a3090b4c4bc7caf79df7259dc194435546237
STEP 4: RUN echo this-should-be-cached-but-it-s-not && sleep 3
this-should-be-cached-but-it-s-not
--> 80dd5a75d2bf47ab0c367a9b710d7d61aee3c5244e671bf97f3b87cba8c9e0bc
STEP 5: ARG USERNAME
--> c5fe829df4307f50000dee4ba92c3c1c9c6935021cab66d2daef41790e0f2b9d
STEP 6: ARG UID
--> 5134e73cc15e7df8157543a410b6e79e45ee7b455bb02d5e2620b20311ab84a2
STEP 7: ARG CODE
--> c18256f52cd8fe9c9a6118b3ddb1cb9821a79eaa97aacb2885577bc0c314ad08
STEP 8: ARG PGDATA
--> 3ad154e836f20c9149e2e4713eaf56e01fcf4c70aa8a383ff8cf6c6c9d18f30d
STEP 9: ARG PORT=55555
--> 5995d7ccd493af50459b7a39637d941de8215cf498375a86c2a4d49609b6505b
STEP 10: CMD ["/container-run"]
STEP 11: COMMIT
--> 6d0873dec7500c1f1295c52e3aa2b049a5cfab04ef079f8a7e1e1ab6ce7ea0b1
```

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
buildah-1.8.2-1.gite23314b.fc30.x86_64
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
Version:         1.8.2
Go Version:      go1.12.2
Image Spec:      1.0.0
Runtime Spec:    1.0.0
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:  
Git Commit:      
Built:           Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
Fedora release 30 (Thirty)
NAME=Fedora
VERSION="30 (Thirty)"
ID=fedora
VERSION_ID=30
VERSION_CODENAME=""
PLATFORM_ID="platform:f30"
PRETTY_NAME="Fedora 30 (Thirty)"
ANSI_COLOR="0;34"
LOGO=fedora-logo-icon
CPE_NAME="cpe:/o:fedoraproject:fedora:30"
HOME_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/"
DOCUMENTATION_URL="https://docs.fedoraproject.org/en-US/fedora/f30/system-administrators-guide/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Communicating_and_getting_help"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugzilla.redhat.com/"
REDHAT_BUGZILLA_PRODUCT="Fedora"
REDHAT_BUGZILLA_PRODUCT_VERSION=30
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT="Fedora"
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT_VERSION=30
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Legal:PrivacyPolicy"
Fedora release 30 (Thirty)
Fedora release 30 (Thirty)
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux raiskup 5.0.17-300.fc30.x86_64 #1 SMP Mon May 20 15:36:26 UTC 2019 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
[storage]
driver = "overlay"
runroot = "/var/run/containers/storage"
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"
[storage.options]
additionalimagestores = [
]
size = ""
override_kernel_check = "true"
mountopt = "nodev,metacopy=on"
[storage.options.thinpool]
ostree_repo = ""
skip_mount_home = "false"
```

comments.body: I'm saying unpredictable because sometime there's cache it little bit sooner or later, it is pretty random.  Especially if I remove the `sleep` from the dockerfile;  so I suppose there's some time of check/time of use race.

We keep build arguments in a map, and when we construct the prefix that encodes their values for inclusion in an image's history, and when we construct that prefix so that we can compare the one we'd use for the current build with the value that's part of a possibly-a-cached-image image's history, we don't make sure that the arguments are in the same order both times.
Looks like a fix for this is being merged.  Please verify the fix.
With locally rebuilt Rawhide package -- caching works perfectly, thank you!
